generated.description: This is an autogenerated partial class definition of 'GrowingDegreeDaysCereals'

description*.en: The sum of excess temperature over 5.5°C, where the temperature is the mean of the minimum and maximum atmospheric temperature in a day. This measure is appropriate for most cereal crops.

title: GrowingDegreeDaysCereals
description: The sum of excess temperature over 5.5°C, where the temperature is the mean of the minimum and maximum atmospheric temperature in a day. This measure is appropriate for most cereal crops.
